description: Dusty pink textured handbagFlap in front with a golden coloured zipper along the edge allowing one to use it as a pocket; loop with tab on flap for decorationPaneled front with brand badgeBuckle detail at the sideOne main zippered compartment with a slip pocket and a mobile slot on one side and two zippered pockets on the otherZippered pocket at the backShort removable handle for carrying ease
